label.partial_time: Close only during specific hours of the day
label.subject: Subject

hint.all_day: If unchecked, the closure will be all-day. When multiple days are selected, the same hours apply to each day.
hint.cancel_reservations: If checked, reservations during the target period will be automatically cancelled.
hint.press_check_preview: Press the "Check Affected Reservations" button to review affected reservations.

message.no_reservations: No reservations found for the target period

dialog.title: Confirm Send
dialog.confirm_message: Send bulk notification with the following details?

error.time_range_required: Please select both start and end times
error.time_range_order: Start time must be before end time

template.staff_sick_subject: [Important] Temporary closure due to staff illness
template.staff_sick_body:
Thank you for your continued patronage.

We regret to inform you that due to staff illness,
we will be closed on __PERIOD__.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused to customers with reservations.

Please contact us to rebook your appointment.
template.maintenance_subject: [Important] Temporary closure due to equipment maintenance
template.maintenance_body:
Thank you for your continued patronage.

We regret to inform you that due to equipment maintenance,
we will be closed on __PERIOD__.

We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

Please contact us to rebook your appointment.
template.emergency_body:
Thank you for your continued patronage.

We regret to inform you that due to weather or an emergency,
we will be closed on __PERIOD__.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused to customers with reservations.

We will contact you again once the situation improves.
